item.title: Homemade cream cheese recipe
item.description: With just three simple ingredients and a few inactive hours, this Homemade Cream Cheese is creamier, fluffier, and more delicious than anything store-bought. You’ll love it smeared on protein bagels or a piece of toast.

media:content.media:title: Homemade cream cheese recipe
media:content.media:description: With just three simple ingredients and a few inactive hours, this Homemade Cream Cheese is creamier, fluffier, and more delicious than anything store-bought. You’ll love it smeared on protein bagels or a piece of toast.

item.title: Refreshing Watermelon Margaritas Recipe
item.description: These watermelon margaritas are so refreshing and delicious. They’re perfectly sweet, tart and easy to throw together. This is a batch cocktail so you can mix, chill and serve. Serve these with my carne asada tacos, baja fish tacos and queso fundido for the perfect meal.

media:content.media:title: Refreshing Watermelon Margaritas Recipe
media:content.media:description: These watermelon margaritas are so refreshing and delicious. They’re perfectly sweet, tart and easy to throw together. This is a batch cocktail so you can mix, chill and serve. Serve these with my carne asada tacos, baja fish tacos and queso fundido for the perfect meal.

item.title: Veggie Crunch Sandwich Recipe! Refreshing and Delicious
item.description: This ultimate veggie sandwich is full of bright colors, crunchy textures and a red pepper hummus that is so delicious and flavorful. It takes mere minutes to throw together and is perfect for a picnic, day at the beach of work from home lunch. Serve it with my aguas frescas for a delicious combination.

media:content.media:title: Veggie Crunch Sandwich Recipe! Refreshing and Delicious
media:content.media:description: This ultimate veggie sandwich is full of bright colors, crunchy textures and a red pepper hummus that is so delicious and flavorful. It takes mere minutes to throw together and is perfect for a picnic, day at the beach of work from home lunch. Serve it with my aguas frescas for a delicious combination.

item.title: Fluffy Strawberry Lemon Mini Sheet Cake
item.description: Is there anything cuter than pink cake? I think not. This Mini Strawberry Cake is the perfect small batch cake. It has a deliciously fluffy texture and tastes exactly like a fresh, sweet strawberry.

media:content.media:title: Fluffy Strawberry Lemon Mini Sheet Cake
media:content.media:description: Is there anything cuter than pink cake? I think not. This Mini Strawberry Cake is the perfect small batch cake. It has a deliciously fluffy texture and tastes exactly like a fresh, sweet strawberry.

item.title: Arepas stuffed with melty mozzarella
item.description: Delicious arepas stuffed with melty mozzarella. Saturday mornings in my house growing up looked and smelled like this.

media:content.media:title: Arepas stuffed with melty mozzarella
media:content.media:description: Delicious arepas stuffed with melty mozzarella. Saturday mornings in my house growing up looked and smelled like this.

item.title: Delicious Ice Mocha Recipe
item.description: To make the chocolate syrup, whisk together the granulated sugar and cocoa powder. In a small saucepan, melt the butter and whisk in the milk of choice. Pour in the sugar and cocoa powder and mix until combined and smooth. Chocolate sauce can last up to 2 weeks when stored in the fridge To assembly, add the espresso and chocolate syrup to a jar with a lid. Shake it vigorously. Add the milk and mix. Add ice to a glass, top with milk and whipped cream. Add shaved chocolate on top.

media:content.media:title: Delicious Ice Mocha Recipe
media:content.media:description: To make the chocolate syrup, whisk together the granulated sugar and cocoa powder. In a small saucepan, melt the butter and whisk in the milk of choice. Pour in the sugar and cocoa powder and mix until combined and smooth. Chocolate sauce can last up to 2 weeks when stored in the fridge To assembly, add the espresso and chocolate syrup to a jar with a lid. Shake it vigorously. Add the milk and mix. Add ice to a glass, top with milk and whipped cream. Add shaved chocolate on top.

item.title: Crispy Eggplant Parmesan Sandwich
item.description: Easy and delicious parmesan sandwich recipe

media:content.media:title: Crispy Eggplant Parmesan Sandwich
media:content.media:description: Easy and delicious parmesan sandwich recipe

item.title: Delicious Feta Dip Recipe with Crispy Sugar Snap Peas
item.description: Try this recipe for a delicious appetizer

media:content.media:description: Try this recipe for a delicious appetizer

item.title: Portobello Mushroom Burgers Recipe
item.description: Portobello Mushroom Burgers inspired by Peruvian flavors and topped with delicious slices of melty These burgers are SO juicy and are perfect when I’m craving something meatless but still satisfying and tasty

media:content.media:title: Portobello Mushroom Burgers Recipe
media:content.media:description: Portobello Mushroom Burgers inspired by Peruvian flavors and topped with delicious slices of melty These burgers are SO juicy and are perfect when I’m craving something meatless but still satisfying and tasty

item.title: Homemade Harlem's Chopped Cheese Sandwich
item.description: The famous Chopped Cheese (also known as Chop Cheese) is New York’s finest bodega sandwich. Seasoned ground beef hits the hot griddle with onions and cheese. Scooped into a soft hero roll and topped with ketchup, lettuce and tomato. The ultimate sandwich!

media:content.media:title: Homemade Harlem's Chopped Cheese Sandwich
media:content.media:description: The famous Chopped Cheese (also known as Chop Cheese) is New York’s finest bodega sandwich. Seasoned ground beef hits the hot griddle with onions and cheese. Scooped into a soft hero roll and topped with ketchup, lettuce and tomato. The ultimate sandwich!

item.title: Refreshing and Delicious: Honey Deuce Cocktail Recipe
item.description: The Honey Deuce Cocktail is the official cocktail of the grand slam tennis tournament, the US Open. It’s made of fresh lemonade, simple syrup, Grey Goose vodka and raspberry liqueur. Garnish it with balls of honeydew melon for the perfect tennis cocktail!

media:content.media:title: Refreshing and Delicious: Honey Deuce Cocktail Recipe
media:content.media:description: The Honey Deuce Cocktail is the official cocktail of the grand slam tennis tournament, the US Open. It’s made of fresh lemonade, simple syrup, Grey Goose vodka and raspberry liqueur. Garnish it with balls of honeydew melon for the perfect tennis cocktail!

item.title: Best Spaghetti and Meatballs Recipe
item.description: This comforting Spaghetti and Meatballs recipe is here for us when we need it most! These meatballs are light-as-a-feather, initially roasted and then braised in sauce.

media:content.media:title: Best Spaghetti and Meatballs Recipe
media:content.media:description: This comforting Spaghetti and Meatballs recipe is here for us when we need it most! These meatballs are light-as-a-feather, initially roasted and then braised in sauce.

item.title: Homemade Choco Tacos Recipe
item.description: These Homemade Choco Tacos consists of a waffle cone “taco shell” stuffed with vanilla ice cream, dipped in milk chocolate and topped with peanuts. I make it a bit different with a fudge-swirled ice cream and lots of different toppings!

media:content.media:title: Homemade Choco Tacos Recipe
media:content.media:description: These Homemade Choco Tacos consists of a waffle cone “taco shell” stuffed with vanilla ice cream, dipped in milk chocolate and topped with peanuts. I make it a bit different with a fudge-swirled ice cream and lots of different toppings!
